prompt: Elegant game main-menu background for an International Chess app. Rich dark walnut and deep teal gradient, subtle luxurious bokeh, a faint marble chessboard receding in perspective in the lower third, soft golden rim light, cinematic, premium mobile game UI splash art, no text, no letters, uncluttered center area for a title.

A single classic Staunton white chess KING piece, glossy polished ivory-white marble, centered, front orthographic view, full piece visible with base, dramatic soft studio lighting with subtle golden rim light, crisp clean edges, high detail, isolated on a fully transparent background, no shadow on ground, no board, no text.
